title: ochyrorchis jaegeri
intro: Ochyrorchis jaegeri, also known as the Yellow Lady Orchid, is a type of flowering plant native to the Himalayan region. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is valued for its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. It is believed to have various health benefits, including relieving respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as reducing fever and alleviating pain. The plant can be prepared into herbal remedies through infusions, decoctions, or powder, which can be used to make teas, capsules, or topical creams.
